author: Gir, Mr. W. A.
title: Kalid-i-Intizam-i-Police
gloss: A book containing instructions for the guidance of the employés of the Police Department.
publisher: Author, Assistant Inspector-General of Police, Criminal Investigation Department

title: Halat wa Ruidad-i-Jalsa-i-Siwum Salana Anjuman-i-Nusrat-ul-Islam, Sri Nagar
gloss: The third annual report of a Muhdmmadan Society named Nusrat-ul-Islam, established for social reform and for the encouragement of education by the maintenance of a school Nusrat ul-Islam, the last 40 pages being devoted to an account of the founder of the school and of his family.

title: Home Mission Mutallaqah U. P. Synod, Punjab
gloss: Report on the working of the Home Mission attached to the United Presbyterian Synod, for the month of March, 1910.

author: Jai Ram Das, Sharma
title: Rishi Santan se Prarthna
gloss: A lecture delivered by the author at the annual meeting of the Brahman Sabha, Lahore, in 1909, on the present condition of the Brahman community.

author: Muhammad Said-ur-Rahman
title: Miraj-i-Taraqqi, Hissa Awwal
gloss: A pamphlet in which the author makes suggestions for the amelioration of the present degraded condition of the Muhammadan community in India.

author: Muin-ud-din, Qazi
title: Muin-un-Nisa alma'ruf ba Mualimm-i-Niswan
gloss: A book for female pupils containing hints on the teaching of arithmetic in particular and on domestic economy in general.

title: Naql-i-Report-i-Dahsalah Jami Masjid, Shahabad
gloss: Report for the ten years ending the 31st December, 1909, of the Jame Masjid, Shahabad.
